creator: mail@ozzmosis.com
text:
On Wed 2013-09-04 10:17:44 UTC+0200, Tilman Keskinöz (arved@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> Are you interested in providing a  patch to upgrade the port and
> maintaining it?

OK, attached are patches for 1.32. Currently I cannot test or maintain
the additional IPV6 code, so I've removed it. You will need to remove
benchmarks/netio/files/patch-netio.c.

Regards
Andrew
